entries.source: Chat Edit: 'Secrets hardening, Persist UI state, Structured logging/tracing, Model Cache robustness, Graceful agent cancellation, Persist chat sessions with RAG, ModelInvoker resilency, GGUF server metrics view, GGUF server config/backoff, Hotpatch rollback & hitstory, Hotpatch health checks, Add MASM templates/snippets, Inline MASM diagnostics, Fix MASM toolchain setup, Hook test runner outputs, Wire build/debug/test docks, Defer large directory population, Add Open Recent persistense, Enforce gitignore filtering, Stabilize headless readiness flow'
